name: Onion-Flavored Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine the ingredients in a large bowl; stir until well blended.
2 Divide about 1 and 1/3 cups of the mix into three 1-pint airtight containers.
3 Label each container as "Onion-Flavored Rice Mix."
4 Store the containers in a cool, dry place. Use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 4 cups of Onion-Flavored Rice Mix.
To prepare:
1 In a medium saucepan, combine 1 and 1/3 cups of the onion-flavored rice mix, 2 cups cold water, and 1 tablespoon butter or margarine.
2 Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3 Cover and reduce the heat. Cook for 15 to 25 minutes, until the liquid is absorbed.
4 Serves 4 to 6.
